body:
No API design issues found. This PR migrates `@azure/arm-certificateregistration` from autorest (`1.0.0-beta.1`) to TypeSpec modular pattern (`1.0.0`, stable), introducing API version `2024-11-01`.

- All `*OptionalParams` interfaces correctly extend `OperationOptions` from `@azure-rest/core-client` ✅
- `CertificateRegistrationManagementClient` constructor overloads are correct ✅
- `KnownVersions.V20241101 = "2024-11-01"` is a valid new API version (no prior `KnownVersions` enum existed) ✅
- CHANGELOG is clean (no alpha version comparison) ✅
- `AzureClouds` enum skipped per guidelines ✅

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37310,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **js - pullrequest (Build UnitTest windows_20x_browser)**: Browser unit tests failed on the previous commit. The `test:browser` script changed from `echo skipped` to `dev-tool run build-test && dev-tool run test:vitest --browser`, enabling real browser tests. These may fail due to missing browser recordings. Action: Record browser test recordings per the [test guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md#run-tests-in-record-mode), or get maintainer approval to skip browser tests. Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=5875631&view=logs&jobId=d81dfa19-13f9-5461-4e01-ed2183deb050).
- ⏳ **js - pullrequest**: ADO pipeline still running on the latest commit (`467a825e`).
- ⏳ **checkenforcer**: Pending — waiting for all checks to complete.
